imageStyle.palette: white-dominant with very pale lavender tint
imageStyle.lighting: soft diffused, subtle white specular top-left

colorNotes.objects: Predominantly white with very subtle lavender tint. NOT saturated purple.
colorNotes.accents: Pink for ear interiors, hearts. Gold for premium elements. Use sparingly.
colorNotes.semantic: Fire=orange-red, Gift=colorful, Star=gold — use natural color when appropriate.
